All functions

Climate BDA (Biological Disturbance Agent) Extension

Epidemiological Disturbance Agents (EDA) Extension

Land Use Plus Extension

LinearWind
Linear Wind Disturbance Extension
MagicHarvest
Magic Harvest Extension

Create Map Names pattern for file outputs

NECN Succession Extension

Cohort Statistics Extension

SocialClimateFire
Social-Climate-Fire Extension
appendPercent()
Ensure percent symbol appended to table values
apply_calibrated_hi_prop()
Overwrite FireSizesTable Sp/Sum/Fall HiProp columns with calibrated values
apply_calibrated_ignprob()
Apply per-base-fuel-type IgnProb multipliers to a FuelTypeTable
assemble_climate_library_file()
Assemble LANDIS-II Climate Library wide-format table from a BioSIM Arrow dataset
assemble_climate_library_file_monthly()
Assemble LANDIS-II Climate Library wide-format table from a monthly BioSIM Arrow dataset
assemble_climate_library_file_monthly_climr()
Assemble LANDIS-II Climate Library wide-format table from a climr Arrow dataset
assemble_climate_library_file_monthly_terraclim()
Assemble LANDIS-II Climate Library wide-format table from a TerraClim Arrow dataset
assemble_climate_library_file_scf()
Assemble Social-Climate-Fire-shaped daily climate CSV from a BioSIM Arrow dataset
bc_fuel_code_to_base()
Default fuel-code -> base-fuel-type mapping (BC FUEL_TYPE_CD factor levels)
bdaAgent()
Construct a Climate BDA agent
biomass_landscape_summary()
Landscape biomass summary by species
build_calibration_scenario_template()
Build the calibration scenario template directory
build_calibration_spinup_scenario()
Build a calibration spinup scenario directory
calibrate_dynamic_fire()
DEoptim driver for Dynamic Fire calibration
calibrate_original_fire()
Calibrate Original Fire
calibration_par_names()
Canonical parameter names for the Dynamic Fire calibration vector
climr_ensemble_8
bcgov-recommended eight-member climr GCM ensemble
cohortSelector()
Construct a cohort selector for a Land Use Plus change block
community_label()
Community label per cell at each snapshot
create_locations_df()
Build batched point-location table from a study area
defaultDGSDammMcNIPParameters()
Default DGS Succession DAMM-McNiP scalar parameters
defaultFireDamageTable()
Create sample Fire Damage Table
defaultFuelCurveTable()
Create sample Fuel Curve Table
defaultFuelTypeTable()
Create default Fuel Type Table
defaultHurricaneMortalityCurve()
Default Hurricane wind-speed mortality curve
defaultLinearWindSeverities()
Default WindSeverities table for the Linear Wind extension
defaultPnETDisturbanceReductions()
Default PnET-Succession DisturbanceReductions table
defaultPnETOutputFiles()
Default Outputs list for the PnET Biomass Output extension
defaultWindSeverities()
Default WindSeverities table for the Original Wind extension
default_severity_prior_sturtevant2009()
Default severity-class prior (Sturtevant et al. 2009)
edaAgent()
Construct an EDA agent
elevationCostRange()
Construct an elevation cost-range entry
exitRoadType()
Construct an exit road type (where wood leaves the landscape)
georef_landis_raster()
Attach CRS and extent from a template to a LANDIS-II raster
get_clim_daily()
Fetch a single year of daily BioSIM weather for one location batch
get_clim_monthly()
Fetch + cache one year of monthly BioSIM weather for one location batch (per-study-area store)
get_clim_monthly_climr()
Fetch one year of monthly climr weather and write Arrow CSV partitions
get_clim_monthly_terraclim()
Fetch a single year-variable of monthly TerraClim weather
get_elevation_rast()
Get an elevation raster for a study area
get_fwi_daily()
Fetch a single year of daily BioSIM Fire Weather Index for one location batch
harvestPrescription()
Construct a Biomass Harvest prescription
host_cpu_info()
Host CPU and RAM identification (cross-platform)
insertANPPTimeSeries()
Specify ANPPTimeSeries for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
insertAvailableLightBiomass()
Specify AvailableLightBiomass for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
insertBuildUpIndex()
Specify Dynamic Fire Extension BuildUpIndex

Specify ClimateConfigFile
insertDOMPools()
Specify DOMPools for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
insertDisturbanceConversionTable()

insertEcoSppDOMParameters()

insertEcoregionParameters()
Specify EcoregionParameters table
insertEcoregionTable()
Specify Dynamic Fuel Extension's Ecoregion Table
insertEcoregionsFiles()
Specify Ecoregions and EcoregionsMap Files
insertEstablishProbabilities()

insertSuccessionExtensions() insertDisturbanceExtensions() insertOtherExtensions()

insertFile()
Specify an input file for an extension
insertFireReductionParameters()
Specify Biomass Succession Extension FireReductionParameters Table
insertFireRegionParametersTable()
Specify Fire Region Parameters Table
insertFireSizesTable()
Specify Fire Size Table
insertForCSMapControl()
Specify ForCSMapControl for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
insertForCSProportions()
Specify ForCSProportions for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
insertFuelCurveTable()
Specify Original Fire FuelCurveTable
insertFuelTypeTable()
Specify Dynamic Fire Extension FuelTypeTable
insertFuelTypesTable()
Specify Dynamic Fuel Extension's Fuel Types Table
insertGroundSlopeFile()
Specify Dynamic Fire Extension GroundSlopeFile
insertHarvestReductionParameters()
Specify Biomass Succession Extension HarvestReductionParameters Table
insertInitialCommunities()
Specify InitialCommunities and InitialCommunitiesMap Files
insertLandisData()
Write a LANDIS-II LandisData header block
insertLightEstablishmentTable()
Specify LightEstablishmentTable for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
insertMaxBiomassTimeSeries()
Specify MaxBiomassTimeSeries for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
insertMinRelativeBiomass()
Specify Biomass Succession Extension MinRelativeBiomass Table
insertOutputTables()
Specify OutputTables for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
insertRandomNumberSeed()
Specify Scenario RandomNumberSeed
insertRootDynamics()
Specify RootDynamics for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
insertSeasonTable()
Specify Dynamic Fire Extension's Season Table
insertSpeciesDataFile()
Specify Species Data File
insertSpeciesEcoregionDataFile()
Specify SpeciesEcoregionData File
insertSpeciesFuelCoefficients()
Specify Dynamic Fuel Extension's Species Fuel Coefficients
insertSpeciesParameters()
Specify SpeciesParameters for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
insertSpinUp()
Specify SpinUp for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
insertSufficientLight()
Specify Biomass Succession Extension SufficientLight Table
insertUphillSlopeAzimuthMap()
Specify Dynamic Fire Extension UphillSlopeAzimuthMap
insertValue()
Specify an input parameter value for an extension
insertWindCurveTable()
Specify Original Fire WindCurveTable
landCoverChange()
Construct a Land Cover Change for a landUseType()
landUseType()
Construct a Land Use type
landis_archive_rep()
Move a completed LANDIS-II replicate from scratch to its final location
landis_find()
Find the LANDIS-II console for a local installation
landis_find_docker()
Find the LANDIS-II console path inside a Docker container
landis_image_info()
Read the LANDIS-II Docker image reference used for a run
landis_pool_exec()
Execute a command in one of the warm-pool containers
landis_pool_restart_one()
Restart a single container in a warm Docker pool
landis_pool_start()
Start a warm Docker pool for LANDIS-II calibration
landis_pool_stop()
Stop and remove all containers in a warm Docker pool
landis_replicate()
Create replicate directories for a LANDIS-II scenario
landis_process() landis_run()
Run a LANDIS-II simulation from the R session
landis_run_docker()
Run a LANDIS-II simulation inside a Docker container
landis_run_local()
Run a LANDIS-II simulation locally (synchronous)
leading_species()
Leading species per cell at each snapshot
loss_from_stats()
Compute the calibration loss from N replicate trial outputs
parse_dynamic_fire_logs()
Parse a Dynamic Fire run's event and summary logs
parse_landis_log_versions()
Parse a LANDIS-II Landis-log.txt for version metadata
patch_fire_config()
Patch a dynamic-fire.txt in place with candidate calibration parameters
plot_species_biomass()
Plot species biomass over time (stacked area)
plot_transitions()
Plot vegetation transitions (Sankey / alluvial diagram)

Create ClimateConfigFile
prepClimateFile()
Prepare ForCSClimateFile for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
prepDGSFireReductionParameters()
Prepare DGS Succession FireReductionParameters table

prepDynamicEcoregionTable()

prepEcoregionParameters()

prepEcoregionsFiles()

prepFireReductionParameters()

prepFireRegionParametersTable()

prepFireSizesTable()
Prepare Dynamic Fire Extension FireSizes Table
prepFuelTypesTable()
Create Dynamic Fire Extension's Fuel Types Table
prepHarvestReductionParameters()
Prepare Biomass Succession Extension HarvestReductionParameters Table
prepInitialCommunities()
Create InitialCommunities and InitialCommunitiesMap Files
prepInitialFireRegionsMap()
Create Original Fire InitialFireRegionsMap
prepInitialWeatherDatabase()
Create Dynamic Fire Extension's Initial Weather Database
prepMinRelativeBiomass()
Prepare Biomass Succession Extension MinRelativeBiomass Table
prepNECNFireReductionParameters()
Prepare NECN Succession FireReductionParameters table
prepPNEToutputsites()
Prepare PnET-Succession PNEToutputsites input file
prepPnETClimateFile()
Prepare PnET-Succession Climate input file
prepPnETDisturbanceReductions()
Prepare PnET-Succession Disturbance Reductions file
prepPnETEcoregionParameters()
Prepare PnET-Succession Ecoregion Parameters file
prepPnETGenericParameters()
Prepare PnET-Succession Generic Parameters file
prepPnETSpeciesParameters()
Prepare PnET-Succession Species Parameters file
prepSnagFile()
Prepare SnagFile for Forest Carbon Succession (ForCS) extension
prepSpeciesData()
Species Data File
prepSpeciesEcoregionDataFile()
Create Species Ecoregion Data File
prepSuppression_CSV_File()
Prepare Suppression_CSV_File for Social-Climate-Fire extension
prepTopographyFile() prepGroundSlopeFile() prepUphillAzimuthMap()

prepWindEventParametersTable()
Prepare Original Wind WindEventParametersTable
prep_daily_weather() prep_monthly_weather_biosim() prep_monthly_weather_climr() prep_monthly_weather()
Prepare Climate Data
proj_daymet
PROJ4 strings for climate data
proj_nrcan_lcc
PROJ4 strings for forest data
prov_landis_container()
LANDIS-II container image and digest (provenance)
prov_landis_versions()
LANDIS-II console and extension versions (provenance)
prov_run_resources()
LANDIS-II per-replicate resource use (provenance)
prov_stochasticity()
LANDIS-II stochasticity summary (provenance)
read_biomass_c_snapshots()
Read ForCS log_BiomassC snapshots
read_biomass_output_rasters()
Read Output.Biomass raster snapshots
read_landis_resource_logs()
Read per-rep resource logs written by landis_run_docker() / landis_run_local()
roadType()
Construct a non-exit road type
run_calibration_spinup()
Run the calibration spinup scenario (blocking)
run_calibration_validation()
Re-simulate at the calibrated parameter vector for goodness-of-fit plots
save_observed_fire_targets()
Save observed fire-regime targets (NFDB-derived) for calibration loss
scenario()
Create LANDIS-II scenario files
sim_landis()
Run one DEoptim trial for a candidate parameter vector (blocking)
sim_mock()
Mock simulator backend for testing the calibration driver without LANDIS-II
sim_r_reimpl()
Standalone-R Dynamic Fire reimplementation (stub)
simplifyCohorts()
Simplify cohorts
suitabilityFile()
Construct a habitat-suitability file reference
tar_landis()
Create a targets target that runs one LANDIS-II replicate
test_ecoregionPolys
Test ecoregion polygons
transition_data()
Build a transition data frame for alluvial plots
windSpeedVulnerability()
Construct a per-species wind-speed vulnerability curve
writeClimateData()
Write LANDIS-II Climate Input File to disk
write_landis_scenario_file()
Write a LANDIS-II scenario.txt file (lower-level helper)
yesno() truefalse()
Convert logical to a LANDIS-II yes/no or true/false token

Developed by Alex M Chubaty.
